name: combobox
visual_summary: A dropdown combobox that allows users to select an item from a list of options. It consists of a main button that opens a list of options below. Typically used as a form input to select a value from a predefined list.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: combobox
Description: A dropdown combobox that allows users to select an item from a list of options. It consists of a main button that opens a list of options below. Typically used as a form input to select a value from a predefined list.
Style: e.g. none
Interactions: e.g. click
Tags: dropdown, list, select, form, input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
